mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TT1.*, ROWNUM AS rnum FROM ( SELECT t1.trip_conts_id AS tripContsId, t1.trip_nm AS tripNm, COALESCE(t1.trip_path_nm, t2.file_path_nm) AS tripPathNm, t1.trip_addr AS tripAddr, t1.trip_tag AS tripTag, COUNT(*) OVER() AS totalCnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM relation r WHERE r.trip_conts_id = t1.trip_conts_id AND r.user_no = #{tripInqCnt} AND r.rel_clsf = 10) AS tripInqCnt FROM TRIP t1 LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT board_id, MAX(file_path_nm) as file_path_nm FROM ATTACH_FILE GROUP BY board_id ) t2 ON t1.trip_conts_id = t2.board_id WHERE 1=1 AND (t1.trip_path_nm IS NOT NULL OR t2.file_path_nm IS NOT NULL)
AND (UPPER(t1.TRIP_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchWord}) || '%' OR UPPER(t1.TRIP_ADDR) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchWord}) || '%')
AND (
UPPER(t1.TRIP_TAG) LIKE '%' || UPPER(TRIM(#{tag})) || '%'
UPPER(t1.TRIP_TAG) LIKE '%' || UPPER(TRIM(#{tripTag})) || '%'
)
ORDER BY
t1.TRIP_INQ_CNT DESC, t1.TRIP_CONTS_ID DESC
t1.TRIP_CONTS_ID DESC
) TT1 WHERE ROWNUM <= (#{pageNo} * #{pageSize}) ) WHERE rnum >= ((#{pageNo} - 1) * #{pageSize} + 1)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO relation ( REL_NO, REL_CLSF, USER_NO, TRIP_CONTS_ID ) VALUES ( SEQ_REL_NO.NEXTVAL, #{relClsf}, #{userNo}, #{tripContsId} )
